svg.title: Figure 2, EfficientNet-B4 model architecture with Grad-CAM extraction and two-phase training
svg.desc: Vertical inference pipeline: input tensor through Stem Conv, seven MBConv stages, final 1792-channel conv targeted by Grad-CAM, Global Average Pool, Linear classifier head, and decision threshold at 0.93. Right panel shows training phases and Grad-CAM connection.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What preprocessing produces the [3,224,224] float32 tensor fed to EfficientNet-B4 in Fake67?')
sendPrompt('What does the EfficientNet-B4 stem convolution layer do?')
sendPrompt('What are the 7 MBConv stages in EfficientNet-B4 and how does compound scaling work?')
sendPrompt('Why does Fake67 extract Grad-CAM gradients from model.features[-1], the final conv layer?')
sendPrompt('How does Global Average Pooling compress 1792 feature maps into a 1792-dim embedding vector?')
sendPrompt('How does the Linear(1792→2) classifier head and sigmoid produce the spoof_score in Fake67?')
sendPrompt('How was the decision threshold 0.93 tuned to the EER point on the Fake67 test set?')
sendPrompt('How does Grad-CAM produce the jet-colormap heatmap overlay and 4-band softmax attribution in Fake67?')
sendPrompt('In Fake67 Phase 1 training, which layers are frozen and why?')
sendPrompt('In Fake67 Phase 2 training, which top-N blocks are unfrozen and what learning rate is used?')
